worldData.instructions:
MOVE — the sun follows your cursor; all of its light comes with it.
Time passes on its own — the sun slowly ages to moonlight and back.
CLICK & HOLD — time races.

Six stones stand in the meadow. Hold the sun near each until its runes shine — lit stones STAY lit, even if you leave. When all six are light, click once to wake the tree.

The grown tree bears seven buds: click each to open it into a flower. One bud breathes BLUE — open it and the night of Chapter III begins: the tree bears fruit; pick each at its brightest to set seven stars in the sky, and the sun is reborn.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: HELIOS: the Held Sun — drag carries it, holding ages it day\u2194moon, release freezes the sky.

visualTypes.name: helios
